7741.one_line_summary: EIP-712 based operator authorization with nonce management for meta-transactions.
7741.notes: Follows EIP-2612 pattern closely but uses random bytes32 nonces instead of sequential; applies to any operator model contract including EIP-6909 and EIP-7540.

7743.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension enabling shared multi-owner NFTs with provider fees and ownership archiving.
7743.notes: Deviates from ERC-721 single-owner model by disabling approvals and safe transfers to prevent unintended transfers in co-ownership scenarios; maintains ERC-721 compatibility via supportsInterface.

7744.one_line_summary: Global bytecode registry enabling trustless contract discovery and verification by bytecode hash.
7744.notes: Prevents re-indexing of same bytecode hash to mitigate collision attacks; excludes EIP-7702 delegated accounts; allows bytecode reindexing if original indexed contract self-destructed.

7746.one_line_summary: Composable security middleware interface for before/after function call validation.
7746.notes: Enables modular security layers independent of contract logic; layers can maintain state for complex validations like rate limiting; reverts on validation failure ensure fail-safe.

7750.one_line_summary: On-chain employment system with Soulbound Tokens, labor contracts, escrow payments, and reputation.
7750.notes: Uses SBTs for employment history; includes contract execution, salary escrow, dispute resolution via moderators, and review system for reputation; primarily employment/labor focused rather than token or governance.

7751.one_line_summary: Standard error wrapping using WrappedError custom error for better revert message handling.
7751.notes: Standardizes nested bubbled-up reverts across multiple contracts; enables tools like Etherscan and Foundry to display detailed error traces; allows additional context via details bytes parameter.

7754.one_line_summary: Tamperproof wallet RPC method for dapp-to-wallet communication via signed requests and DNS verification.
7754.notes: Uses dapp DNS records and signed payloads to prevent MITM attacks on wallet interactions; requires <2 hour key caching; supports ES256 and EdDSA signature algorithms.

7758.one_line_summary: ERC-20 meta-transaction extension using EIP-712 signatures with random nonces for atomic transfers.
7758.notes: Addresses EIP-2612 sequential nonce limitations by using random bytes32 nonces; enables gas delegation, batching, and recipient-triggered transfers; includes optional cancelAuthorization.

7760.one_line_summary: Minimal ERC-1967 upgradeable proxy bytecode standards for transparent, UUPS, and beacon patterns.
7760.notes: Provides minimal bytecode variants with optional immutable arguments and onchain implementation queries; deliberately omits PUSH0 for EVM compatibility; does not emit ERC-1967 events in bytecode.

7765.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension for real-world asset NFTs enabling privilege exercise by token holders.
7765.notes: Allows exercising real-world privileges via onchain transactions; includes optional metadata extension for privilege URIs; compatible with ERC-721 metadata and enumerable extensions.

7766.one_line_summary: ERC-4337 extension for signature aggregation enabling shared validation across bundled UserOperations.
7766.notes: Withdrawn due to lack of production adoption of aggregatable signature schemes; defines IAggregator interface for aggregateSignatures and validateSignatures; requires staked aggregators per ERC-7562.

7769.one_line_summary: JSON-RPC API specification for ERC-4337 bundlers and wallets including debug methods.
7769.notes: Standardizes eth_sendUserOperation, eth_estimateUserOperationGas, eth_getUserOperationByHash, eth_getUserOperationReceipt, eth_supportedEntryPoints, eth_chainId methods; includes EIP-7702 authorization support.

7770.one_line_summary: ERC-20 standard for partially redeemable synthetic assets backed by collateral with fractional reserve.
7770.notes: Tracks totalBorrowedSupply and requiredReserveRatio; supports segregated accounts excluded from reserve calculations; enables lending markets and risk curators to mint fractional reserve tokens.

7774.one_line_summary: Cache invalidation mechanism for ERC-6944 web3:// resolve mode using EVM events and HTTP headers.
7774.notes: Introduces evm-events Cache-Control directive and ClearPathCache event; supports wildcards in cache invalidation paths; maintains cache key-value mapping per chain/contract/pathQuery.

7776.one_line_summary: Standard API for publishing on-chain financial statements (income statements and balance sheets).
7776.notes: Returns financial data as structs with optional detail fields; all values denominated in specified stablecoin; supports balance sheet snapshots and income statements via timestamp parameters.
